---
applyTo: "**/*.py"
---

Before reporting any issue:

- Verify exact file and line.
- Do not infer missing code without confirming presence.
- Do not assume router registration is missing.
- Do not assume missing imports without scanning the full file.
- Do not escalate to Critical unless strictly verified.

If uncertain:
- Mark as "Uncertain – requires confirmation".
- Do not present assumptions as facts.

Accuracy is more important than aggressiveness.
False positives are worse than missing minor issues.
